title: 2019 1099-Misc and 1099-Div Information
summary: Class A, B, and C Shareholders will not receive a 1099 for the non-taxable January 2019 dividend, or for the Elders Benefit. Class B Shareholders will receive a 1099-MISC form for the June distribution only. If you won an prize such as the early bird, or Stock Will Extravaganza, a separate1099-MISC...

title: Kodiak Office Closed 1/29/2020 due to Hazardous Weather
summary: The Kodiak Koniag office will be closed on January 29, 2020 due to the extreme weather conditions. Those needing assistance in the meantime can call the Anchorage office at 800.658.3818 toll-free or directly at 907.561.2668. Drive safe and stay warm! Source

title: Great Employee, New Citizen
summary: Citizenship is something that most of us take for granted, but not Anden Owens. On January 24, 2020, Anden was sworn in as a U.S. Citizen. Anden moved to the United States from his home country of Jamaica in 2016 and applied for citizenship in 2018. “I had to go through many interviews,” Anden recal...
